edits.slides.13.title: No shared language, no fixed home
edits.slides.13.content: Icons pulled from different sources — a blue arrow, a green lasso, a grey starburst, a red trash can. No shared style, no fixed placement. Every new feature added noise.
edits.slides.13.caption: Old toolbar — scattered, mixed-style icons. [ADD: old-toolbar screenshot showing icon fragmentation.]
